result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS created_date,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS created_date,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS created_date,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''

FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS created_date,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::date >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::date <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::date >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::date <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::date >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::date <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') <> ''
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
